name: Chicken Crunch
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Chicken (10 3/4 oz)
1 1/2 cups Pepperidge Farm Herb-Seasoned Stuffing, finely crushed
1 tbsp Chopped fresh parsley or dried parsley flakes (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine 1/3 cup soup and 1/4 cup milk; set aside.
2. On waxed paper, lightly coat chicken with flour; dip into soup mixture.
3. On another piece of waxed paper, coat chicken with stuffing.
4. Place chicken on a baking sheet. Drizzle with margarine. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink.
5. In a 1-quart saucepan, combine remaining soup, 1/4 cup milk, parsley and lemon juice. Heat through over low heat, stirring occasionally.
Serving suggestion: With sugar snap peas and carrots.
